sql: SELECT COUNT(data_sibay.nisn) AS jumlah, ceklis.npsn, profil.`nama Madrasah` AS `NAMA SATUAN PENDIDIKAN`, profil.NSM, data_sibay.tahun, SUM(data_sibay.status_siswa = 'Yatim') AS yatim, SUM(data_sibay.status_siswa = 'Piatu') AS piatu, SUM(data_sibay.status_siswa = 'Yatim Piatu') AS yatim_piatu, SUM(data_sibay.status = 'selesai') AS `selesai upload`, COUNT(data_sibay.nisn) - SUM(CASE WHEN data_sibay.status = 'selesai' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS `selisih belum upload`, SUM(data_sibay.status = 'penambahan') AS penambahan, profil.`tingkat madrasah`, ceklis.ceklis_berkas, CONCAT(' chek ') AS link FROM ceklis LEFT OUTER JOIN profil ON profil.NPSN = ceklis.npsn LEFT OUTER JOIN data_sibay ON data_sibay.npsn = ceklis.npsn AND data_sibay.tahun = YEAR(CURDATE()) GROUP BY ceklis.npsn, profil.`nama Madrasah`, profil.NSM, data_sibay.tahun, profil.`tingkat madrasah`, ceklis.ceklis_berkas, CONCAT(' chek ') ORDER BY profil.`tingkat madrasah`
name: rekap

fields.name: selisih belum upload
fields.sqlExpression: COUNT(data_sibay.nisn) - SUM(CASE WHEN data_sibay.status = 'selesai' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)

fields.name: link
